pi_items.source: Web search + source code verification. Einstein's 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' published in Annalen der Physik, v17, pp891-921, June 30, 1905. Seed_library.py line confirms year: '1905'.
Web search confirms Nature publication. LeCun, Bengio, Hinton 'Deep Learning' Nature 521, 436-444 (2015). DOI: 10.1038/nature14539. Seed_library.py line confirms DOI: '10.1038/nature14539'.

Web search confirms publication journal. Turing 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' published in Mind, Volume LIX, Issue 236, October 1950, pages 433-460. Seed_library.py line confirms publication: 'Mind'.

privileged_info_summary: All three metadata targets are correct values for canonical academic papers: Einstein's special relativity paper was published in 1905 (Annalen der Physik), LeCun et al.'s Deep Learning review was published in Nature with DOI 10.1038/nature14539 (2015), and Turing's Computing Machinery and Intelligence was published in Mind journal (1950). The task requires fixing three intentional corruptions: Einstein year (1095→1905), LeCun DOI (missing→10.1038/nature14539), and Turing publication (Mnd→Mind). Data comes from real academic papers with intentional errors introduced into the Zotero database during setup.
